title: KelUI
description: Custom menu for my taste, i.e. how I feel comfortable using components
body:
## KeUI Custom menu to my taste, i.e. how I feel comfortable using the components [![alinlib](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/alinlib/Requires.svg)](/mod/alinlib) What menus are changing here: - Main Menu - Pause menu - Chat - and more :) Set of custom icons for KelUI: https://github.com/kel-cu/KelUI-Icons
Русский перевод для старых версий Был сделан пак-перевод для старых версий KelUI на Русский язык
https://github.com/kel-cu/KelUI-Russian-Translate
Screenshots - ### Main menu ### Pause menu ### In Game ### Loading overlay ### Edgeless chat [![kel](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/me/Made%20by.svg)](https://kelcu.ru)
